cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Thomas could have gone to the football field. The question is asking between what times he could have gone, given all the other activities he was doing. Let me break down each piece of information step by step. First, Thomas woke up at 8am. That's just a starting point, but doesn't necessarily mean he was doing something else right away. Then, David saw Thomas fixing their computer at the electronic store from 8am to 10am. So from 8 to 10, Thomas was at the electronic store. That means he couldn't go to the football field during that time because he was already at the computer store. Next, Jennifer saw Thomas buying lunch at the deli from 10am to 12pm. So from 10 to 12, he was at the deli. So again, he's busy then. Not available for the football field. Then, Lisa saw Thomas walking towards the Statue of Liberty from 12pm to 2pm. So between 12 and 2, he was heading to the Statue of Liberty. So that time slot is taken up. So no football field there. Sarah saw Thomas buying a phone at the electronics store from 2pm to 5pm. So from 2 to 5, he's at the electronics store again. So that's another block of time when he's occupied. So no football field during that time either. Kimberly saw Thomas buying a bike at the bike shop from 6pm to 9pm. So from 6 to 9, he's at the bike shop. Important to note that the football field was closed after 9pm. So he can't go to the football field after 9pm because it's closed. Now, let's map out the timeline of Thomas's day based on the given information: - 8am to 10am: Electronic store (computer fixing) - 10am to 12pm: Deli (buying lunch) - 12pm to 2pm: Walking towards Statue of Liberty - 2pm to 5pm: Electronics store (buying a phone) - 6pm to 9pm: Bike shop (buying a bike) So the only time slots not accounted for are: - 5pm to 6pm: Between when he finished buying the phone (at 5pm) and when he went to the bike shop (at 6pm). So this is a one-hour window where he's not reported to be doing anything. So this is the only time he's free. Also, note that the football field was closed after 9pm. So even if he had gone after 9pm, he couldn't have gone, but he was at the bike shop from 6pm to 9pm. So the only possible time he could have gone to the football field is between 5pm and 6pm. Let me check the options: (A) 12pm to 2pm - He was walking towards the Statue of Liberty, so no. (B) 8am
